zotero.abstractNote: We introduce Convolutional Differentiable Logic Gate Networks (CDLGNs), a novel class of neural networks that replace standard convolutional layers with learnable logic gate circuits. By representing logic gates as differentiable functions, we enable end-to-end training of hardware-efficient, interpretable, and sparse models. CDLGNs achieve competitive performance on image classification tasks while requiring significantly fewer parameters and operations than traditional CNNs, making them particularly suitable for resource-constrained environments.
